commit.message:
feat(model-3d): add face splitting to Circle and Arc tools

Both tools now split existing HEMesh faces when drawing on them,
matching the Rectangle tool's behavior. Circle generates a 32-point
N-gon polygon; Arc uses its curve points as a closed polygon (arc +
chord). Falls back to standalone 3D geometry on ground plane.

3 lives, escalating speed, streak counter, Press Start 2P font,
local leaderboard (np-rain-lb), keyboard + mouse + touch controls.
Added to IT Team Dashboard Games section.

fix: restrict Reddit ingestion to financial subreddits (#62)

* feat: hide neutral items from sentiment history by default

Neutral sentiment results add noise to the recent analysis list without
providing actionable signal. The history endpoint now excludes neutral
items by default, with an opt-in `includeNeutral=true` query parameter
for callers that need the full dataset.

Closes #53

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: restrict Reddit ingestion to financial subreddits

Reddit search was missing restrict_sr=on, causing posts from unrelated
subreddits (e.g. r/gamecollecting) to be ingested as financial sentiment.
Added subreddit allowlist as defense-in-depth filtering layer.

commit.message:
fix: initialize competitor/campaign/industry details on checkbox toggle

Array fields (compareAspects, metrics, focusAreas) in sub-schemas were
required but never initialized, causing "Required" validation errors
even when the user filled in the primary fields. Add .default([]) to
these schema arrays and initialize the full sub-object when the
corresponding objective checkbox is toggled on, which also ensures
proper localStorage persistence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: VPN proxy support — route each persona through different exit IP

Solves the #1 ban cause: all 6 accounts hitting Instagram from the
same GitHub Actions datacenter IPs.

Architecture:
- Proton VPN Free (unlimited bandwidth, no CC) + wireproxy (userspace
  WireGuard → SOCKS5 proxy, no root needed on GH Actions)
- Each persona gets a different VPN server = unique exit IP
- Composite action (.github/actions/setup-proxy) handles download,
  config, startup, and health check
- PROXY_URL env var injected into .env at runtime
- publisher.py passes proxy to instagrapi cl.set_proxy()
- Graceful fallback: if WG_CONFIG_* secret not set, runs without proxy

Secret mapping:
  WG_CONFIG_MAYA → port 10801 (maya IG + YT)
  WG_CONFIG_ARYAN → port 10802
  WG_CONFIG_CHOOSEWISELY → port 10803
  WG_CONFIG_MODERNTRUTHS → port 10804
  WG_CONFIG_RHEA → port 10805
  WG_CONFIG_SOFIA → port 10806

Setup: bash setup_proxy.sh (uploads WireGuard configs as GH secrets)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: migrate styling from Stitches to Tailwind CSS v4 (#1178)

* chore: migrate styling from Stitches to Tailwind CSS v4

- Add @fresh/plugin-tailwind and register it in dev.ts
- Create static/styles.css with @theme (custom colors, display font),
  @layer base (body styles), and @layer components (container,
  breadcrumb ::after, RenderHTML adjacent selectors)
- Replace all Stitches css() calls with Tailwind utility classes across
  layout, text, link, list, section, symbol, app shell, and page components
- Remove inline CSS injection from _app.tsx; serve styles via <link>
- Delete shared/styles/ and core/css/ Stitches infrastructure files
- Remove Stitches reset() from _middleware.ts and normalize CSS
  pre-warming from main.ts
- Fix crossOrigin="" → crossOrigin="anonymous" in DefaultHead.tsx
- Update CI workflows to type-check all .ts/.tsx files instead of
  only main.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve tailwindcss module for @fresh/plugin-tailwind

Add nodeModulesDir=auto and tailwindcss npm dependency so that
@tailwindcss/node can resolve the tailwindcss package via enhanced-resolve,
fixing the "Can't resolve 'tailwindcss'" error on dev server startup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve style regressions from Stitches to Tailwind CSS v4 migration

- Restore link underline: Tailwind v4 preflight resets `a { text-decoration: inherit }`,
  so add explicit `a { text-decoration: underline }` in @layer base
- Fix ul/ol margin-top: remove `m-0` from UnorderList/OrderList so that
  `.rh-p + ul/ol` adjacent selector in @layer components can take effect
- Fix ol numbering: add `list-decimal` to OrderList
- Fix cms-space margin: remove `m-0` from Text component so that
  `.rh-p:has(span.cms-space)` rule in @layer components can take effect
- Fix Red Hat Display font: move Google Fonts links from DefaultHead (which
  used <Head> in <body> and did not render in Fresh 2.x) directly into
  <head> in _app.tsx; delete now-unused DefaultHead component
- Fix dynamic Tailwind classes: replace template literal class names
  (`text-${fontSize}`, `font-${fontWeight}`) with static record maps
  in Text and Heading components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: rename font-display to font-logo and remove unused components

- Rename `--font-display` → `--font-logo` in @theme to better reflect its
  purpose (logo only), and update usages in Logo.tsx and _error.tsx
- Delete unused Box.tsx and layout/mod.ts (no longer imported anywhere)

feat: implement complete Vinyl macOS menubar app

Full implementation of the Vinyl music diary app:

Backend (Go):
- Wails v2 app with 25+ bindings exposed to frontend
- Music detection: Spotify API (OAuth2 PKCE), Spotify/Apple Music AppleScript
- Session lifecycle state machine (idle/active/ending) with configurable gap/duration
- SQLite database with migrations, full CRUD, analytics queries
- OpenWeatherMap integration with 30-min cache
- IP-based geolocation (ip-api.com) for location detection
- Annual HTML book export with vintage typography
- Spotify token storage via macOS Keychain

Frontend (Svelte 4 + Tailwind 3):
- Vintage warm-brown aesthetic with noise overlay and vignette
- Spinning vinyl disc animation with album art
- Now Playing view with progress bar, mood picker (12 moods), weather
- Diary view with GitHub-style 52-week heatmap + expandable session cards
- Insights view with pattern analysis and day-of-week chart
- Settings with location detection, weather API, Spotify OAuth, export
- 4-step onboarding wizard for first run

Tests: 14 tests covering config, diary models, store CRUD, player types

commit.message:
Count skippable page types (blank, illustration, etc.) as translated

Pages with page_type in SKIP_TRANSLATION_PAGE_TYPES don't need translation —
the Lambda worker correctly skips them. But pages_translated cache didn't count
them, so books with a few blank pages showed as ~98% instead of 100%.

Updated both cron and admin sync-page-counts routes to use $or condition:
page has translation.data OR page_type is a skip type.

Fixes 2,507 books; fully translated count jumps from 1,008 to 2,196.

Fix concurrent request failure by closing transport before reconnecting

McpServer singleton only supports one transport at a time. Without
closing first, concurrent requests fail with "Already connected to a
transport". This was causing 500 errors on every MCP tool call.

- ev-cell.weekend.ev-puente: fondo rosa sólido suave (sin rayas)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove 'missed' from receiver UPDATE listener to prevent premature hangup

The call record is created with status='missed' as initial state.
Any unrelated UPDATE to the row (push notification, DB trigger) would
trigger the receiver's listener which checked status==='missed' and
immediately called resetCall(), killing the ringing after ~1 second.

Now only 'rejected', 'ended', or ended_at trigger a reset. The caller's
endCall() always sets ended_at, so missed calls are still handled.

commit.message:
fix(ios): exclude persistent chat from "Archive All Sessions"

Archive all was deleting the chat session locally before the server
rejected it (CHAT_SESSION_PROTECTED), leaving the UI in a broken state.
Filter chat out of the archive list, keep it in local state, and switch
the active session to chat after archiving. Sidebar now always renders
its List so NavigationSplitView can push to chat on compact, with the
Tron placeholder overlaid when no non-chat sessions exist. Settings
button/count also exclude the chat session.

commit.message:
Add summary, readiness, and log commands

summary: single exec returning last workout, this-week count vs 3x
target, and next A/B/C session recommendation.

readiness: 14-day frequency check with overdue flag (>3 days) and
A/B/C rotation suggestion — one paragraph output.

log <description> [--confirm]: parses natural-language workout
descriptions (3x5 squat 100kg, 3 sets of 10 push-ups, etc.), fuzzy-
matches exercise names against the exercises cache (case-insensitive,
hyphen/space normalised), prints a confirmation summary, and POSTs to
the Hevy API only when --confirm is passed.

Also adds api_post helper, promotes timedelta to top-level import,
adds 14 new unit tests (44 total), and updates SKILL.md to steer
agents toward the new compound commands.
